title: Import Images & Video Content from Airtable in Monday.com

posts.author: csdutoit_envisual (Candice du Toit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there.

Is there an easier way for us to import our Content planning calendars from Airtable to Monday.com?

The written content is fine, but my question is regarding image / video attachments added to Airtable bases.

The only way we can see this happening is one by one, with some of our newer clients is fine. But other clients that have been on there for over 3 years and has over 3 years of images to be reuploaded.

posts.author: FrancisElliott (Francis Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Candice,

Data migration is definitely a challenge that increases with time and volume. There are no doubt solutions to this, however in order to develop some kind of custom migration automation in make.com (which would be my first approach), I’d need to know more information. Feel free to contact me via flyingravendesign@gmail.com if you are interested.

Additionally, I would encourage you to contact monday.com support first, as they are incentivised to improve your experience with their product. They may be able to help you themselves or direct you accordingly.

Good luck!
